# CTB Release Evidence Template

Use this template before moving a CTB issue to `Ready for Release` or `Done`.

## Issue Summary

* `Issue`
* `Owner`
* `Risk tier`
* `Release date`

## Scope

* what changed
* why it changed
* impacted users, tenants, or workflows

## Validation Evidence

* lint / type-check status
* unit test status
* integration / contract test status
* QA status
* security review status

## Operational Readiness

* deployment steps
* feature flags
* monitoring expectations
* alert coverage

## Rollback Plan

* rollback trigger conditions
* rollback steps
* owner responsible for rollback

## Residual Risks

* known limitations
* accepted risks
* follow-up actions

## Approval

* human approver
* approval timestamp
* post-release owner
